sites.name: HeadyMe
sites.role: Personal AI Cloud — command center for your sovereign digital intelligence
sites.description: HeadyMe is the sovereign command center for your personal AI cloud. It orchestrates 20+ specialized AI agents across 17 concurrent swarms, giving you a continuously learning digital intelligence that grows smarter with every interaction.

sites.name: HeadySystems
sites.role: Self-healing infrastructure engine with Sacred Geometry orchestration
sites.description: HeadySystems is the enterprise backbone — self-healing infrastructure with Sacred Geometry orchestration, φ-scaled resource allocation, 17-swarm concurrent execution, and zero-downtime deployment across multi-cloud environments.

sites.name: HeadyAI
sites.role: AI Research Lab — Continuous Semantic Logic, vector memory, pattern evolution
sites.description: HeadyAI is the research and scientific intelligence division. It houses Continuous Semantic Logic (CSL) — geometric vector operations as logical gates — 3D vector memory with 384-dimensional embeddings, and pattern evolution engines protected by 51+ provisional patents.

sites.name: HeadyOS
sites.role: Latent OS — continuous AI reasoning beneath every device and interface
sites.description: HeadyOS is the invisible operating system that runs beneath your IDE, browser, and devices. It continuously reasons, learns, and orchestrates AI agents in 3D vector space — projecting UIs, connectors, and apps dynamically from a living latent state.

sites.name: HeadyConnection
sites.role: 501(c)(3) Non-Profit — AI literacy, digital equity, community empowerment
sites.description: HeadyConnection is a 501(c)(3) non-profit dedicated to AI literacy, digital equity, and community empowerment. Through grant programs, educational initiatives, and open-source tools, we ensure sovereign AI benefits everyone.

sites.name: HeadyConnection Community
sites.role: Community Portal — collaborative workspace, shared projects, events
sites.description: HeadyConnection Community is where AI builders, researchers, and creators come together. Join collaborative workspaces, contribute to open-source projects, attend community events, and shape the future of sovereign AI.

sites.name: HeadyEX
sites.role: Marketplace — discover, deploy, and trade AI agents and bee workers
sites.description: HeadyEX is the marketplace for AI agents and bee workers. Discover pre-built agents, deploy custom swarms, trade HeadyBee templates, and access the 30+ bee type catalog — all operating with equal concurrent status in the Heady ecosystem.

sites.name: HeadyFinance
sites.role: Investor Relations — financial reports, patent portfolio, growth metrics
sites.description: HeadyFinance is the investor relations and financial intelligence hub. Access quarterly reports, explore the 51+ patent portfolio, review growth metrics, and understand the market opportunity for sovereign AI infrastructure.

sites.name: Admin Portal
sites.role: Ops Dashboard — service health, swarm monitoring, deployment controls
sites.description: The Admin Portal is the internal operations dashboard for HeadySystems. Monitor all 50 services, observe 17-swarm concurrent execution, manage deployments, and enforce system directives — all in real-time.
